content: Platform content map for music marketing: TikTok = trend-driven short video, challenges, viral sounds, Gen Z/millennial audience, highest organic discovery ceiling, post 3-5x/week minimum. Instagram Reels = more polished performance-driven clips, 3-5 Reels/week + daily Stories, followers convert to streams/tickets at higher rates than TikTok followers — smaller engaged IG following more valuable than large passive TikTok following. YouTube Shorts = cross-post best TikTok/Reels, minimal extra effort, contributes to YouTube music discovery algorithm, long-form YouTube content builds catalog revenue for years. X (Twitter) = conversational, real-time news, industry networking, less music discovery. Threads = conversational, community building, text-first. Facebook = older demographic, still relevant for 25-45 age bracket. Key finding: artists posting short-form video 3x/week see 2.5x higher Spotify profile visits from external sources. Cross-posting TikTok to IG Reels and YouTube Shorts increases overall engagement 178%.
